summary: Silent video, a CBP retweet of a DHS clip. It shows a two-outcome comparison with bold text overlays: 'IF ICE FINDS YOU' over footage of a person being detained on the ground, and 'IF YOU SELF-DEPORT' over people boarding a charter plane. It ends on the CBP Home app screen showing a $1,000 exit bonus. There is no music.
notable_text: IF ICE FINDS YOU; IF YOU SELF-DEPORT; Home - Getting You Home Quickly And Easily; Receive a $1,000 exit bonus; DHS.GOV/CBPHOME
